# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3'
services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch-oss:6.8.21
    container_name: elk-elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=elk-elasticsearch
      - cluster.name=docker-cluster
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash-oss:6.8.21
    container_name: elk-logstash
    volumes:
      - ./logstash:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline
    environment:
      - "LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana-oss:6.8.21
    container_name: elk-kibana
    ports:
      - 5601:5601
